name: Operating System Kernel and Device Drivers

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['kernel','syscall','driver','scheduler','memory_management'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/(kernel module|syscall|device driver|page table|kernel space|scheduler|\/dev\/|ioctl|interrupt handler|virtual memory)/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
